case_title: ROSE MARY SANTIAGO VS. ISIS SYSTEMS GROUP,INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF SANTIAGO, ROSE MARY AS TO DEFENDANT ISIS SYSTEMS GROUP,INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SANTIAGO, ROSE MARY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ISIS SYSTEMS GROUP,INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $6,617.94 PRINCIPAL, $81.79 INTEREST, $156.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,856.03, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
